name: hecateflow
description: Reusable, MCU-agnostic embedded-development skill system distilled from a real multi-core bare-metal C project.

interface.shortDescription: Embedded-dev lifecycle skills: init, design, implement, refactor, review, per-edit safety gate.
interface.longDescription: HecateFlow orchestrates the full embedded-development lifecycle with interactive, MCU-agnostic skills: workspace and per-target initialization, incremental module design, incremental implementation, behavior-preserving refactor, deep review, and an always-on per-edit safety gate (volatile/ISR/numeric/peripheral). A persistent project manifest (.hecateflow/project.json) remembers your MCU family, toolchain, build system, and targets so skills only ask for what they don't already know.
defaultPrompt: 初始化这个嵌入式工作区
